programme.title: Drive Tv: Launch Pad
programme.desc: (PG) Jess and Dom kick off the journey in the bold new Jaecoo J7 SHS, a plug-in hybrid SUV. The challenge? See if they can travel from Noosa to a QLD remote destination on one tank.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Launch Pad
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Vehicle Insights
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Launch Pad
programme.desc: (G) Maserati elegance is on full display as Jess explores the return of an icon - the refreshed GranTurismo. A fusion of timeless design and modern luxury.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Launch Pad
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.
